verses.text: 'Make a joyful noise unto the LORD, all ye lands,' serving Him with gladness and coming before Him with singing. Worship is joyful service. God is to be served not grudgingly but with a glad and singing heart.

'Make a joyful noise unto the LORD, all ye lands,' serving Him with gladness and coming before Him with singing. Worship is joyful service. God is to be served not grudgingly but with a glad and singing heart.
'Know ye that the LORD he is God,' our Maker, and 'we are his people, and the sheep of his pasture.' We belong wholly to Him. To know who God is and whose we are is the ground of all true worship.

Enter His gates with thanksgiving and His courts with praise, 'for the LORD is good; his mercy is everlasting.' His goodness is endless. The reason for unceasing praise is the unfailing, age-long mercy of God.
